resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def isSubstringPresent(self, s: str) -> bool:
        rev_s = s[::-1]
        for i in range(len(s) - 1):
            substr = s[i:i+2]
            if substr in rev_s:
                return True
        return False
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution iterates through the string to generate all possible substrings of length 2 and checks if they exist in the reversed string.
